mapper.sql: asset_id, asset_no, asset_name, asset_type, location, total_quantity, available_quantity, status, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark

b.borrow_id, b.asset_id, a.asset_no, a.asset_name, b.applicant_user_id, b.applicant_name, b.purpose, b.status, b.approver_user_id, b.approver_name, b.review_comment, b.apply_time, b.review_time, b.create_by, b.create_time, b.update_by, b.update_time, b.remark
mapper.select: select from campus_asset where status = '0' and available_quantity > 0 order by asset_type, asset_name, asset_id
select from campus_asset where asset_id = #{assetId} and status = '0' and available_quantity > 0 for update
select from campus_asset_borrow b inner join campus_asset a on a.asset_id = b.asset_id where b.borrow_id = #{borrowId} and b.status = '1' for update
select from campus_asset_borrow b inner join campus_asset a on a.asset_id = b.asset_id where b.applicant_user_id = #{userId} order by b.apply_time desc, b.borrow_id desc
select from campus_asset_borrow b inner join campus_asset a on a.asset_id = b.asset_id where b.status = '1' order by b.apply_time, b.borrow_id
mapper.update: update campus_asset set available_quantity = available_quantity - 1, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where asset_id = #{assetId} and status = '0' and available_quantity > 0

update campus_asset_borrow set status = '2', approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, review_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{approverName}, update_time = sysdate() where borrow_id = #{borrowId} and status = '1'

update campus_asset_borrow set status = '3', approver_user_id = #{approverUserId}, approver_name = #{approverName}, review_comment = #{reviewComment}, review_time = sysdate(), update_by = #{approverName}, update_time = sysdate() where borrow_id = #{borrowId} and status = '1'
